mapper.sql:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_CHK_IDX1) ORDERED USE_NL(B C)*/
COUNT(*) CNT
SEQ, EVENT_SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, ROWNUM RNUM2
SEQ, EVENT_SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO, DECODE(MNP_IND_CD, '', '신규', '이동') MNP_IND_CD_NM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO','CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD',(SELECT CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID)) CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD_NM, SUB_LINK_NAME, SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 7) LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO','CUSTOMER_TYPE',(SELECT CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID)) CUSTOMER_TYPE_NM, USER_SSN, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_SALE_ID) AGENT_SALE_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE STATUS = 'A' AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) IMG_CNT, TO_CHAR(STAY_EXPIR_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') STAY_EXPIR_DT, NVL(CHK_MANTY, '') CHK_MANTY, MEMO1 MEMO1_STR, AGENT_MEMO, CHK_STATUS, ROWNUM RNUM2
SEQ, EVENT_SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO, DECODE(MNP_IND_CD, '', '신규', '이동') MNP_IND_CD_NM, SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 7) LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, AGENT_ID, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DT, CHK_STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_CHK', 'CHK_STATUS', CHK_STATUS) CHK_STATUS_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE IMG_GUBUN IN ('10', '11', '12') AND STATUS = 'A' AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) IMG_OPEN_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE IMG_GUBUN IN ('20', '21', '22', '23', '24') AND STATUS = 'A' AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) IMG_ID_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE IMG_GUBUN NOT IN ('10', '11', '12', '20', '21', '22', '23', '24') AND STATUS = 'A' AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) IMG_ETC_CNT, DECODE(SUBSTR(CHK_MANTY, INSTR(CHK_MANTY, '|D') + 2, 1), '0', '검수', '1', '미비', '2', '없음', '없음') D_STR, DECODE(SUBSTR(CHK_MANTY, INSTR(CHK_MANTY, '|I') + 2, 1), '0', '검수', '1', '미비', '2', '없음', '없음') I_STR, DECODE(SUBSTR(CHK_MANTY, INSTR(CHK_MANTY, '|E') + 2, 1), '0', '검수', '1', '미비', '2', '없음', '없음') E_STR, DECODE(SUBSTR(CHK_MANTY, INSTR(CHK_MANTY, '|S') + 2, 1), '0', '검수', '1', '미비', '2', '없음', '없음') S_STR, MEMO1, DECODE(MEMO1, '', 'N', 'Y') MEMO1_FLAG, REG_ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN_ID) REG_ADMIN_NM, CHK_ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CHK_ADMIN_ID) CHK_ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(CHK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CHK_DATE
FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_CHK A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B, PPS_CUSTOMER C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM
AND REG_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REG_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = (select F_GET_LIKE_CTN2_CONTRACT_NUM(#{searchNm}) from dual)
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchNm}
AND A.EVENT_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND CHK_STATUS = #{searchChkStatus}
AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
AND CHK_STATUS IN ('20', '21')
AND CHK_STATUS NOT IN ('00')
mapper.select:
SELECT EVENT_SEQ, COUNT(*) TOT_CNT, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '10', 1, 0)) STATUS10, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '20', 1, 0)) STATUS20, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '21', 1, 0)) STATUS21, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '00', 1, 0)) STATUS00, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '90', 1, 0)) STATUS90, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '91', 1, 0)) STATUS91, SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '99', 1, 0)) STATUS99, REG_ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN_ID) REG_ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(EVENT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') EVENT_DT, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DT
,AGENT_ID ,F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM
,'ALL' AGENT_ID ,'ALL' AGENT_NM
FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_CHK A, PPS_CUSTOMER B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
AND REG_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REG_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND A.EVENT_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
GROUP BY EVENT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), REG_ADMIN_ID, EVENT_DT
,AGENT_ID
ORDER BY EVENT_SEQ DESC

SELECT EVENT_SEQ, COUNT(*) TOT_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '10', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS10, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '20', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS20, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '21', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS21, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '00', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS00, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '90', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS90, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '91', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS91, NVL(SUM(DECODE(CHK_STATUS, '99', 1, 0)), 0) STATUS99, NVL(REG_ADMIN_ID, '-') REG_ADMIN_ID, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN_ID), '-') REG_ADMIN_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(EVENT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') EVENT_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') REG_DT
,NVL(AGENT_ID, '-') AGENT_ID ,NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID), '-') AGENT_NM
,'ALL' AGENT_ID ,'ALL' AGENT_NM
FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_CHK A, PPS_CUSTOMER B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
AND REG_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REG_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND A.EVENT_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
GROUP BY EVENT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), REG_ADMIN_ID, EVENT_DT
,AGENT_ID
ORDER BY EVENT_SEQ DESC

SELECT STATUS, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, CMS_ACCOUNT, FILE_PATH, FILE_TYPE, ADMIN_MEMO, (SELECT MAX(RCG_AMT) FROM PPS_CODE_SERVICE_TOPUP WHERE KT_MODE = 'CHG_CASH_REFILL' AND SOC = (SELECT SOC FROM PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)) TOPUP_AMT FROM PPS_AGENT_CMS_REQ A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SEQ = #{seq}

SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN)) = 13 THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 6) ELSE CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN) END USER_SSN, SUB_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
